# Geographic range

Records were filtered by removing records that did not fall within an area of interest: `r report_name` (Figure \@ref(fig:geographicRangeFig)).

```{r geographicRangeFig, fig.cap = paste0("Boundary of the area of interest: ", report_name)}

m <- tm_shape(extent_sf) +
  tm_borders()

tmap::tmap_leaflet(m)

```
